name: Farseer Taldeer
description:
After the eldar defeat in Kronus, this lonely farseer of the Aeldari tries to survive while being chased by their enemies. But the she notice that she is not alone in the cold tundra.

Well this is my second character. i get inspiration from the fanfic called 'Love can bloom in the battlefield'

If you find any bugs or bad behaviour, please notify me. I will try to correct as soon as posible

The art was found here: https://www.peakpx.com/en/hd-wallpaper-desktop-nbezu . I dont know the original artist sadly :(
creator: Nick_reach
